Bitcoin rises after Bank of Japan hikes interest rates to a 31-year high
description: The Bank of Japan raised its key interest rate by 25 basis points to 1%, the highest level since 1995.

title: Profit-taking across bitcoin, ether, solana as traders wait on the Iran signing
description: A US-Iran deal pulled oil lower and lifted stocks, but bitcoin's bounce is hesitant. ETF outflows just paused after a record run, and analysts say the market wants the deal signed before pricing it in.

title: XRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
description: Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs bled cash Monday while every other crypto ETF gained
description: Ether, XRP, Solana and Hyperliquid funds all took in money, but bitcoin's outflow was really just Grayscale's GBTC.

title: Tether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit
description: These options, settled in USDT, let traders hedge risk, speculate on gold prices.

title: Treatment of the Relaxation of the Terms and Conditions for the Securities Lending Facility
BOJ Current Account Balances by Sector (May)
South Korean police arrest 23 individuals in $11 million USDT laundering case: report
description: From February 2024 to April 2025, the group allegedly moved $11.1 million in illegal funds by purchasing USDT and trading on exchanges.

title: French BTC treasury firm Capital B developing STRC-style bitcoin credit instrument
description: Capital B is developing a digital credit instrument similar to Strategy's STRC and Strive's SATA.

title: The Real Cowboys of Crypto: Wyoming Ropes a $1 Stablecoin
description: The state, home of Yellowstone and a refuge of the rich, has become the first in the US to issue its own cryptocurrency. Its experiment has national implications.

title: IMF says Nigeria’s stablecoin adoption is ‘testing the limits’ of monetary and regulatory frameworks
description: The IMF said stablecoin adoption in Nigeria is testing monetary and regulatory frameworks, while warning of digital dollarization risks.

title: ‘That’s the wrong question’: Bitwise CIO reframes bitcoin bottom debate, points to long-term drivers
description: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said Galaxy, NYDIG, and Standard Chartered disagree on bitcoin's bottom, but all three expect another bull cycle.

title: SpaceX Crypto Short Squeeze Briefly Sends Value to $3 Trillion
description: A short squeeze in SpaceX perpetual futures briefly sent the company’s implied valuation to $3 trillion on blockchain-based markets shortly after Monday’s US stock-market close.

title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
description: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

title: Bitcoin buyers add over 250,000 BTC between $59,000 and $67,000 as accumulation returns
description: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.

title: India files charges against 8 defendants in alleged $20 million Coinbase spoofing scam
description: India's Directorate of Enforcement charged Chirag Tomar and associates over an alleged $20 million Coinbase spoofing scheme.

title: BlackRock's new bitcoin ETF lets institutions earn from volatility. There's a catch.
description: Your day-ahead look for June 16, 2026

title: Coinbase, AWS enable publishers on CloudFront and WAF to charge AI agents via x402 protocol
description: Coinbase and AWS are allowing publishers on CloudFront and WAF to charge AI agents for content via the x402 protocol.

title: Mystery Polymarket trader turned $4 million into $9 million after Spain's shocking World Cup draw
description: A days-old account turned about $4 million into a $9 million profit betting against Spain, an anomaly trade that onchain sleuths are asking whether it was luck or inside information.

title: BlackRock's new bitcoin income fund offers cash flow alongside BTC exposure
description: After IBIT's $49 billion success, BlackRock says clients are increasingly seeking ways to earn income from long-term bitcoin holdings.

title: BlackRock launches new Bitcoin ETF that generates income using a covered call strategy
description: BITA holds bitcoin and BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF (IBIT) and generates income by selling call options on up to 35% of those IBIT holdings.

title: Robinhood cuts 10% of staff, expects $28 million in restructuring charges
description: Robinhood cut 10% of its staff and expects $28 million in restructuring charges tied to flattening management layers and an efficiency push.

title: Ledn says bitcoin-backed lending market could reach $1 trillion as securitization attracts institutional capital
description: The company estimates it has a 30% share of the global consumer bitcoin-backed lending market, originating $1.4 billion in loans in 2025.

title: This AI builds you a business, runs it, and settles payments in USDC
description: Y Combinator's Locus Founder lets users text a business idea via iMessage, SMS, or Telegram, and the AI handles the rest.

title: Philip R. Lane: Outlook for the euro area economy
CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 12.9% while index trades lower
description: Stellar (XLM), up 2.7% from Monday, joined Uniswap (UNI) as a top performer.

title: Gate CrossEx: An Exchange-Native Answer to the Institutional Capital Fragmentation Problem
description: For sophisticated crypto desks, the bottleneck has rarely been finding liquidity, but rather moving capital fast enough to use it. A fund running active books across the largest CEXs operates multiple separate balance sheets that don’t talk to each other. Every account must be funded to meet worst-case requirements. Collateral can’t be netted across venues. […]

title: Bitcoin’s rally and HYPE’s record run mask a market still waiting for real conviction, analysts say
description: Bitcoin held above $66,000 after the Iran truce as HYPE hit a fresh ATH above $76, but Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged thin ETF conviction.

title: State Street launches GENIUS-compliant money market fund for stablecoin issuers
description: SSCXX is a Rule 2a-7 government money market fund, a conservative type of fund that invests only in cash and yield-bearing cash equivalents.

title: Ripple buys into Flutterwave Series E at $3.2 billion valuation, backs RLUSD integration
description: Ripple backs Flutterwave's $3.2 billion Series E with RLUSD and XRP Ledger integration across 34 African markets through investment.

title: Race to Turn AI Compute Into a Commodity Spurs New Crypto Boom
description: Ethan Vera thought Luxor Technology’s future was helping Bitcoin miners buy and sell mining hardware.

title: Binance Prepares for EU Exit With Local License in Limbo
description: Binance Holdings Ltd. is making preparations to stop providing services in the European Union, as a deadline to receive a license to operate in the bloc draws near and the crypto exchange has yet to receive approval from Greece’s financial regulator.

title: Binance may be forced to halt services for EU clients next month: Reuters
description: The reported setback comes just weeks before the EU's July 1 deadline for crypto firms to obtain MiCA authorization or cease operating.

title: State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund
description: The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market.

title: SEC Chair Atkins defends CFTC’s Selig despite questions over agency’s ability to regulate prediction markets
description: SEC Chair Paul Atkins came to the defense of CFTC Michael Selig as the derivatives agency digs in its heels on regulating prediction markets.

title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
description: An EU crypto license application by the world’s largest crypto exchange is set to be rejected by the Greek regulator HCMC, according to a report from Reuters.

title: Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
description: The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities.

title: Wall Street Stares Down Crypto-Style Trading All Day, Every Day
description: Traditional finance firms are starting to embrace round-the-clock trading for a range of assets in a way that has disrupted schedules in crypto for years.

title: Forward Solana treasury stock jumps 8% as smaller DATs reject acquisition bids
description: Solana DAT stocks are moving on Tuesday as the largest SOL DAT Forward works to keep its acquisition bids alive.

title: MANTRA to be acquired by Inveniam, backer that invested $20 million last year
description: The deal comes after MANTRA’s token suffered a major collapse in 2025 and then the company announced a restructure and layoffs.

title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
description: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.
